name: Giani Kartar Singh (Kartar Bhawan, Moga)
body: At the moment we do not have much information about Giani Kartar Singh Ji but his Kirtan speaks for itself. Giani Kartar Singh Ji studied Gurmat Sangeet at the esteemed Daudhar Taksal. He is also the founder of Gurdwara Kartar Bhawan in Moga and some of his students include Giani Harjeet Singh Ji and Giani Jaswant Singh Ji. If anyone has more information or recordings of Giani Kartar Singh Ji, please contact us.

tracks.name: Giani Kartar Singh (Kartar Bhawan, Moga) – Asa Ki Vaar (1985)
